Built on Oklahoma Roots

Elkhorn Landscaping & Lawn Care started with a simple goal: to build exceptional outdoor spaces for our Oklahoma City neighbors. We're a family-owned and operated business, deeply rooted in the OKC community.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our hardscaping contractor services.

What materials are best for Oklahoma patios?

Flagstone, pavers, and stamped concrete are all excellent choices for OKC patios. We can help you choose the material that best suits your style, budget, and the specific conditions of your property.

How long does patio installation take?

The timeline depends on the size and complexity of the project, but most patio installations take between 1-2 weeks. We'll provide you with a detailed schedule during the design phase.

Do I need a permit for patio installation?

In some cases, a permit may be required. We'll handle all necessary permit applications and ensure that your project complies with local regulations.

Reviews From Our Hardscaping Contractor Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Elkhorn Landscaping did an amazing job on our new patio! The design process was smooth, and the crew was professional and efficient. They were very careful to protect our existing landscaping and cleaned up thoroughly each day. We are thrilled with the final result and highly recommend them!"

Sarah M. Patio Installation

"We hired Elkhorn to build a retaining wall in our backyard to address some serious erosion issues. They did a great job designing a wall that not only solved the problem but also looks fantastic. There were a couple of minor delays due to weather, but they communicated well throughout the process."

David K. Retaining Wall Construction

"Our driveway was cracked and uneven, and Elkhorn Landscaping was able to repair it quickly and affordably. The team was professional and courteous, and they did a great job matching the existing concrete. Highly recommend!"

Jessica L. Driveway Repair
